resources.string: Displays the book you\'re reading, including the cover, title, author, and the time and days spent reading it.
Sorted by pages read per day
Not every book is for every reader, and that\'s okay.
⚠ Pages not found, edit them after adding
There are no registered sessions yet
There are no books recorded in that year/month combination.
In Goodreads: My profile → My books → Import and export → Export library. Then select the .csv file here.
Choose your language / Select your language
🐢 THOSE THAT STOLE YOU THE MOST TIME
⏱️ You can activate it whenever you want
Finish books and add dates to see statistics.
I need your permission to show you the reading time in the notification bar while you read.
Indicates actual content range for accurate progress calculations.
This book is already showing in the widget. Do you want to remove it?
Explain what is happening or what you would improve...
What do you want to do?
There are no saved wrappeds yet
You can contact me directly by email at lecturameter.app@gmail.com
You are trying to add a book that only has 1 page, are you sure?
Reminder to log your pages when a session ends
Everything was already up to date
❌ Google Drive permissions were not granted
✅ Backup ready, save it to Google Drive or similar
No backup found on Google Drive
Do you want to activate local backup?
This will delete the %1$d sessions of “%2$s”. Other editions and cycles are not affected.
This will delete 1 session of “%1$s”. Other editions and cycles are not affected.
Range of the actual content of the book (excludes prologues and final indexes).
Open Library + Google Books (millions of books)
No internet connection. Cannot upload edits.
We need access to the camera to scan the barcode on your books and add them automatically.
Between December 26 and January 26, visit Wrapped to generate and save the year\'s wrapped.
Puedes cambiarlo después en Ajustes / You can change it later in Settings
There are no books read with an assigned genre.
A .csv file is generated with all your books, ready to share or import on Goodreads.
There are no sessions on this date
How do you want to refresh?
You can see it again from Settings.
You can make the timer notification visible by enabling the Lecturameter notifications permission in System Settings → Apps → Lecturameter → Notifications.
What type of feedback is it?
%1$s · Tap a month to see it in detail
Choose how often you want backups to be made
Check your Wi-Fi or mobile data
Search by title, author or ISBN
I need access to storage to save backup copies of your books in the Downloads folder.
Automatically saved to your Wrapped history
Choose how often the widget data is updated

When changing the active edition, the book details (cover, pages, sessions, comments) show those of the new edition. Sessions from the other edition are NOT deleted, they are preserved and become visible again when you reactivate that edition.\n\nIn statistics, each edition counts as a separate book.
If you like Lecturameter, you can buy me a coffee. :)
No comment. Tap ✏️ to add one.
Tap to scan the book\'s barcode
Add a book or import from Goodreads.
Connect your Google account to make automatic copies every 2 hours. The file is saved to your Drive and survives reinstallations.
Do you want to activate Google Drive backup?
Looking for data from the book…
Accessible all year round from the 🎁 icon on the main screen
Save or restore all your progress. Use this before updating the app or changing devices.
There is already a session in progress. Do you want to finish it?
Upload screenshots or photos from your gallery
When you disable a backup type, the buttons turn gray. Tapping them shows a notice: \"Do you want to enable this backup type? Cancel/Accept\".
Are you sure you want to delete \"%1$s\"?
Delete \"%1$s\"? Its sessions will also be removed.
You cannot scan an ISBN without camera permission
Tap the back button again to exit
Tap %1$d more times for a fun Easter Egg
You cannot save the backup to internal storage without permission.
%1$s is no longer displayed on the widget
To choose which book appears, open the app, go to the book details, and tap \"Show in widget\".
You have no books in progress.\nStart reading one.
You haven\'t finished any book yet.
You have no books pending.\nSave the ones you want to read.
You haven\'t dropped any book. Nice!
Finish at least one book with a completion date in %1$d to see your wrapped.
Your best month was %1$s with %2$d pages
Next wrapped on December 26. %1$d days left
The starting page cannot be less than 1.
The final page exceeds the book\'s total pages.
The final page cannot exceed the last functional page (%1$d).
The final page cannot be less than the starting page.
⚠️ No valid books found in the file
No internet connection. Books cannot be searched.
Check your Wi-Fi or mobile data and try again
Try the title in another language or the ISBN
Enter a valid number of pages.
The end date cannot be earlier than the start date.
The final page cannot exceed the book\'s total pages (%1$d).
Invalid date, enter a correct one (dd-MM-yyyy)
Start and end pages are required
Start page must be less than end page
End page must be greater than start page
Check your connection and try again
Each card shows the book\'s info (author, pages, genres, rating) and quick-action buttons: reload cover and genres, change the cover manually, and delete the book. Tap it to open the book\'s detail.
Click the hamburger icon in the upper-left corner to open the complete history of all the books you\'ve read and reread, along with statistics for each one.
The widget displays the book you choose from among the ones you\'re currently reading and shows various statistics from your last reading session. You can customize how often it updates in Settings.

You can back up your entire library (books, sessions, covers, genres, etc.) from Settings → Backups, either locally or to Google Drive. There you can also choose the frequency, the folder and the “Save now” button.
If you like the app, you can support me by leaving a review on the Play Store or through Ko-fi or PayPal. You can find the links in Settings.
Bulk automatic refresh of genres and covers
Go through the welcome tutorial from the beginning
Suggestions, bug reports, or comments for the developer
Update the genre of your books by looking them up online. This may take several minutes.
Update your book covers by looking them up online. This may take several minutes.
This operation may take several minutes and will overwrite any manual changes made to genres. Do you want to continue?
This operation may take several minutes and will overwrite any manual changes made to covers. Do you want to continue?
Each edition has its own sessions, pages, and cover. Adding a new edition does not affect the existing ones; all of them are retained and appear as separate entries in statistics.
%1$s · Tap a month to see it in detail
%1$s %2$s · Tap any colored day to navigate to its sessions
Between December 26 and January 26, visit Wrapped to generate and save the year\'s wrapped
Organize your library and add books

Add a book by manually entering its details or scan the ISBN barcode with your camera to have it filled in automatically. You can also use the search function to find books by title or author and add them to your library.

Do you have any books on Goodreads? Under Settings > Backup > Import/Export/Restore, you can import your library in CSV format. The reverse process is also possible.\n\nIn this same section, you can export and import your Lecturameter backups and adjust the frequency of automatic backups.

"Each card displays the book\'s information (author, page count, genre, etc.) and quick-action buttons: reload covers and genres, manually change the cover, and delete the book. Click on the card to view the book\'s details.\n\nSwipe the card left or right to mark or unmark a book as a favorite; you can filter by favorites using the "
Check page-charts by individual book, by month, by genre, and by author; session-specific statistics; annual, monthly, and hourly heat maps; as well as an annual "Wrapped" style summary.
Clicking the hamburger icon in the upper-left corner opens a complete history of all the books you\'ve read and reread, along with statistics for each one.
Your books are sorted into shelves: Reading, Read, Rereading, Want to Read, and Dropped.
Add a book manually by filling in its details, or scan the ISBN barcode with the camera to autofill it.

Already tracking books on Goodreads? Go to Settings → Backups → Import/Export/Restore to import your library in CSV format. The reverse also works: export your books from Lecturameter to use them anywhere else.
Use the search to find books by title or author and add them to your library with their data already filled in.
From the menu icon at the top left you can open the full log of all your reading sessions.
While reading, tap \'Start\' and record real time. When you stop, the session is saved automatically.
Review charts of pages per month, genres and authors, plus your annual \'Wrapped\' summary.
The heatmap shows your daily reading activity. Tap any day to see the detail of that session.
Each session stores date, duration, and pages read. They are grouped by cycle if you reread the same book.
A book can have editions in different languages. Switch between them without losing sessions.
Choose from 4 themes: Light, Dark, Aurora and OLED (pure black background).
In Settings you will find bulk refresh of genres and covers, backups, and widget configuration.
Something wrong or have an idea? From Settings → Tools → Send feedback you can write to us directly.

On Xiaomi (MIUI/HyperOS), Oppo (ColorOS), and similar devices, battery restrictions may prevent the Timer and Backup features from working properly. Go to App Info > Battery Saver > No Restrictions to ensure that everything works as expected.
⚠️ Backup pending — it will finish in the background
No editions found in this language
No favorites on this shelf.\nSwipe a card to mark favorites.
Without dates, the challenge counts the current calendar year (including what you already read this year).
Enter a name for the challenge
The goal must be between 1 and 1,000,000
“%1$s” will be deleted. Progress is computed live, nothing else is lost.
You have no challenges.\nCreate one with the button below.
Your completed and expired challenges, by year
Your challenges will show up here once they are completed or expire.
The free plan keeps 3 pages of history per year. Pro keeps the full history.
When a challenge is completed or expires it moves to the history on its own. Find it in the icon at the top right.
No contributions to this challenge yet.
This challenge counts streak days, not books.
The free plan includes 3 pages of active challenges (15 challenges). With Pro you can create unlimited challenges.
When do you read the most?
Compared to your global average (%1$s pages/day)
Goodreads, CSV, JSON backup and restore from Drive
No time data yet. Timer sessions record their start time and will show up here.
Pages per slot, based on each session\'s start time.
Mark favorite books (swipe their card in the list) and they will appear here the year you finish them.

Swipe a book card sideways to mark or unmark it as a favorite. The red stripe on the left indicates a favorite. In the sort menu (sort icon in the search bar) you will find the “Show only favorites” filter, which applies to every shelf. Favorites you finish during the year show up in your Wrapped.

Tap the trophy icon 🏆 on the main screen to see your challenges: books per year, streaks, pages, sessions or minutes. You can create custom challenges with a target and a deadline; progress updates automatically.
" on the main screen to see your challenges: books per year, streaks, pages, sessions or minutes. You can create custom challenges with a target and a deadline; progress updates automatically."
No time data yet. New sessions record their time automatically; your hourly map will appear here in a few days.
Choose which chips and emojis are shown
Filter by series or title (optional, e.g. Wheel of Time)
Start date cannot be after the end date
You already have “%1$s” in your library. Add it anyway?
Edition not yet indexed in the databases. Offered with ISBN %1$s and this book\'s data; you can edit it later.
ISBN not yet indexed in the databases. The ISBN is kept: fill in title and pages manually and you can complete the rest later.
Renews on the 1st of every month
Cells check themselves as you finish and rate books or log sessions.
You have no books in Reading or Rereading. Start a book to be able to time sessions.
🔮 At %1$s pages per day you read, you have ~%2$d reading days left
It hides when you scroll the list or swipe left ← from the line, and comes back by swiping right → from the edge of the screen. Long-press a blue icon to reorder them.
%1$d pages across %2$d sessions this week. Tap to see your recap.
%1$d pages last month. Tap to see your recap.
Your reading year, wrapped up. Tap to discover it.
Swipe left, or tap the edge strip.
Your stats are starting to make sense.
Your first weekly recap is ready
A summary of your reading week, in Statistics.
A new one arrives on the 1st.
Put your current book on your home screen
Add the Lecturameter widget from your launcher.
Lecturameter measures how you read: your books, your sessions and your pace.
Add a book and log your first session. That\'s all you need.
If you were already using Goodreads, you don\'t start from scratch.
On goodreads.com: My profile → My books
(Exporting from Lecturameter to Goodreads is also possible)
The rest comes on its own
Over time you\'ll discover stats, challenges and recaps of your reading year.
Everything stays on your device. Lecturameter doesn\'t know what you read or how you read.
Turn off battery optimization so the timer never stops.
You\'ve reached the end of your recap
"Every page of this year is already yours.\nWhat do you want to read next year?"
Tell us how you use Lecturameter?
One question, ten seconds. Nothing is sent unless you send it.
Answering is optional and anonymous. It helps us decide what to improve first.
Which section do you use the most?
%1$d editions · each one counts as a separate book in statistics · %2$d pages in total
Here is my library exported from Lecturameter (%1$d books).
“%1$s” will be removed from the book. Sessions you logged with it are not deleted, but they will no longer be tied to this edition.
That ISBN is “%1$s”, by %2$s. This book is “%3$s”, by %4$s.\n\nIf you add it, it will be saved as another edition of this book and will count towards its statistics.
This book has %1$s from an earlier session that was never saved. You can carry on from there or start over.
